violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a cart. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The hand-washing sink in the employee toilet room was lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees must be posted at all hand sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Several food containers had an accumulation of adhesive residue and paper. The chest freezer has an accumulation of frost. One milk case has an accumulation of water, with wet packing material from apples lining the bottom of the case. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The trash bin area has an accumulation of unused items, shingles, building repair remnants, buckets, etc. The area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
The floor in the mop room has an accumulation of dried liquid and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on kitchen shelf. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Once certificate is obtained, PIC to register for Rhode Island Certified Food Protection Manager licensef. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2024
